initial_candidates.sql:
WITH yearly_purchase_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_regions.region_name,
        strftime('%Y', bt.txn_date) AS year,
        SUM(bt.txn_amount) AS total_spent,
        SUM(bt.quantity) AS total_quantity,
        SUM(bt.txn_amount) * 1.0 / SUM(bt.quantity) AS avg_purchase_price
    FROM bitcoin_transactions bt
    JOIN bitcoin_members ON bt.member_id = bitcoin_members.member_id
    JOIN customer_regions ON bitcoin_members.region = customer_regions.region_name
    WHERE bt.txn_type = 'purchase'
    GROUP BY customer_regions.region_name, strftime('%Y', bt.txn_date)
),
filtered_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        region_name,
        year,
        avg_purchase_price,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY region_name ORDER BY year) AS year_rank
    FROM yearly_purchase_stats
),
excluded_first_year AS (
    SELECT 
        region_name,
        year,
        avg_purchase_price
    FROM filtered_stats
    WHERE year_rank > 1
),
ranked_by_year AS (
    SELECT 
        year,
        region_name,
        avg_purchase_price,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY year ORDER BY avg_purchase_price ASC) AS price_rank
    FROM excluded_first_year
),
with_prev_year AS (
    SELECT 
        region_name,
        year,
        avg_purchase_price,
        LAG(avg_purchase_price) OVER (PARTITION BY region_name ORDER BY year) AS prev_avg_purchase_price
    FROM excluded_first_year
),
final_result AS (
    SELECT 
        ry.year,
        ry.region_name,
        ry.avg_purchase_price,
        ry.price_rank,
        wpy.prev_avg_purchase_price,
        CASE 
            WHEN wpy.prev_avg_purchase_price IS NOT NULL THEN 
                ((ry.avg_purchase_price - wpy.prev_avg_purchase_price) / wpy.prev_avg_purchase_price) * 100
            ELSE NULL 
        END AS pct_change_from_prev_year
    FROM ranked_by_year ry
    JOIN with_prev_year wpy ON ry.region_name = wpy.region_name AND ry.year = wpy.year
)
SELECT 
    year,
    region_name,
    avg_purchase_price,
    price_rank,
    prev_avg_purchase_price,
    pct_change_from_prev_year
FROM final_result
ORDER BY year ASC, price_rank ASC;

WITH annual_avg_price AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_regions.region_name,
        strftime('%Y', bt.txn_date) AS year,
        SUM(bt.txn_amount) / SUM(bt.quantity) AS avg_purchase_price
    FROM bitcoin_transactions bt
    JOIN bitcoin_members ON bt.member_id = bitcoin_members.member_id
    JOIN customer_regions ON bitcoin_members.region = customer_regions.region_name
    WHERE bt.txn_type = 'purchase'
    GROUP BY customer_regions.region_name, strftime('%Y', bt.txn_date)
),
filtered_annual_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        region_name,
        year,
        avg_purchase_price,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY region_name ORDER BY year) AS year_seq
    FROM annual_avg_price
),
filtered_no_first_year AS (
    SELECT 
        region_name,
        year,
        avg_purchase_price
    FROM filtered_annual_avg
    WHERE year_seq > 1
),
ranked_by_year AS (
    SELECT 
        region_name,
        year,
        avg_purchase_price,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY year ORDER BY avg_purchase_price) AS price_rank
    FROM filtered_no_first_year
),
with_year_over_year AS (
    SELECT 
        region_name,
        year,
        avg_purchase_price,
        price_rank,
        LAG(avg_purchase_price) OVER (PARTITION BY region_name ORDER BY year) AS prev_year_price,
        CASE 
            WHEN LAG(avg_purchase_price) OVER (PARTITION BY region_name ORDER BY year) IS NOT NULL 
            THEN ((avg_purchase_price - LAG(avg_purchase_price) OVER (PARTITION BY region_name ORDER BY year)) 
                  / LAG(avg_purchase_price) OVER (PARTITION BY region_name ORDER BY year)) * 100
            ELSE NULL
        END AS yoy_change_pct
    FROM ranked_by_year
)
SELECT 
    region_name,
    year,
    avg_purchase_price,
    price_rank,
    prev_year_price,
    ROUND(yoy_change_pct, 2) AS yoy_change_pct
FROM with_year_over_year
ORDER BY year ASC, price_rank ASC;

WITH yearly_region_purchases AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_regions.region_name,
        strftime('%Y', bt.txn_date) AS year,
        SUM(bt.txn_amount) AS total_spent,
        SUM(bt.quantity) AS total_quantity,
        SUM(bt.txn_amount) * 1.0 / SUM(bt.quantity) AS avg_purchase_price
    FROM bitcoin_transactions bt
    JOIN bitcoin_members ON bt.member_id = bitcoin_members.member_id
    JOIN customer_regions ON bitcoin_members.region = customer_regions.region_name
    WHERE bt.txn_type = 'purchase'
    GROUP BY customer_regions.region_name, strftime('%Y', bt.txn_date)
),
filtered_yearly_purchases AS (
    SELECT 
        region_name,
        year,
        total_spent,
        total_quantity,
        avg_purchase_price,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY region_name ORDER BY year) AS year_rank
    FROM yearly_region_purchases
),
excluded_first_year AS (
    SELECT 
        region_name,
        year,
        avg_purchase_price
    FROM filtered_yearly_purchases
    WHERE year_rank > 1
),
ranked_by_year AS (
    SELECT 
        year,
        region_name,
        avg_purchase_price,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY year ORDER BY avg_purchase_price ASC) AS price_rank
    FROM excluded_first_year
),
with_year_over_year_change AS (
    SELECT 
        year,
        region_name,
        avg_purchase_price,
        price_rank,
        LAG(avg_purchase_price) OVER (PARTITION BY region_name ORDER BY year) AS prev_year_price
    FROM ranked_by_year
)
SELECT 
    year,
    region_name,
    avg_purchase_price,
    price_rank,
    CASE 
        WHEN prev_year_price IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE (avg_purchase_price - prev_year_price) * 100.0 / prev_year_price
    END AS yoy_percentage_change
FROM with_year_over_year_change
ORDER BY year ASC, price_rank ASC;

WITH yearly_region_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_regions.region_name,
        strftime('%Y', bt.txn_date) AS year,
        SUM(bt.txn_amount) AS total_spent,
        SUM(bt.quantity) AS total_quantity,
        SUM(bt.txn_amount) * 1.0 / SUM(bt.quantity) AS avg_purchase_price
    FROM bitcoin_transactions bt
    JOIN bitcoin_members ON bt.member_id = bitcoin_members.member_id
    JOIN customer_regions ON bitcoin_members.region = customer_regions.region_name
    WHERE bt.txn_type = 'purchase'
    GROUP BY customer_regions.region_name, strftime('%Y', bt.txn_date)
),
filtered_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        region_name,
        year,
        avg_purchase_price,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY region_name ORDER BY year) AS year_order
    FROM yearly_region_stats
),
ranked_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        region_name,
        year,
        avg_purchase_price,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY year ORDER BY avg_purchase_price ASC) AS price_rank
    FROM filtered_stats
    WHERE year_order > 1
),
with_changes AS (
    SELECT 
        region_name,
        year,
        avg_purchase_price,
        price_rank,
        LAG(avg_purchase_price) OVER (PARTITION BY region_name ORDER BY year) AS prev_year_price,
        CASE 
            WHEN LAG(avg_purchase_price) OVER (PARTITION BY region_name ORDER BY year) IS NOT NULL 
            THEN (avg_purchase_price - LAG(avg_purchase_price) OVER (PARTITION BY region_name ORDER BY year)) * 100.0 / LAG(avg_purchase_price) OVER (PARTITION BY region_name ORDER BY year)
            ELSE NULL 
        END AS pct_change
    FROM ranked_stats
)
SELECT 
    year,
    region_name,
    avg_purchase_price,
    price_rank,
    pct_change
FROM with_changes
ORDER BY year ASC, price_rank ASC;

WITH annual_purchase_prices AS (
    SELECT
        customer_regions.region_name,
        strftime('%Y', bt.txn_date) AS year,
        SUM(bt.txn_amount) / SUM(bt.quantity) AS avg_purchase_price
    FROM bitcoin_transactions bt
    JOIN bitcoin_members ON bt.member_id = bitcoin_members.member_id
    JOIN customer_regions ON bitcoin_members.region = customer_regions.region_name
    WHERE bt.txn_type = 'purchase'
    GROUP BY customer_regions.region_name, strftime('%Y', bt.txn_date)
),
filtered_annual_prices AS (
    SELECT
        region_name,
        year,
        avg_purchase_price,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY region_name ORDER BY year) AS year_rank
    FROM annual_purchase_prices
),
excluded_first_year AS (
    SELECT
        region_name,
        year,
        avg_purchase_price
    FROM filtered_annual_prices
    WHERE year_rank > 1
),
ranked_annual AS (
    SELECT
        region_name,
        year,
        avg_purchase_price,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY year ORDER BY avg_purchase_price ASC) AS price_rank
    FROM excluded_first_year
),
with_growth AS (
    SELECT
        region_name,
        year,
        avg_purchase_price,
        price_rank,
        LAG(avg_purchase_price) OVER (PARTITION BY region_name ORDER BY year) AS prev_year_price
    FROM ranked_annual
)
SELECT
    region_name,
    year,
    avg_purchase_price,
    price_rank,
    ROUND((avg_purchase_price - prev_year_price) / prev_year_price * 100, 2) AS annual_pct_change
FROM with_growth
ORDER BY year ASC, price_rank ASC;

candidates.sql:
WITH yearly_purchase_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_regions.region_name,
        strftime('%Y', bt.txn_date) AS year,
        SUM(bt.quantity * bt.txn_amount) AS total_spent,
        SUM(bt.quantity) AS total_quantity,
        SUM(bt.quantity * bt.txn_amount) * 1.0 / SUM(bt.quantity) AS avg_purchase_price
    FROM bitcoin_transactions bt
    JOIN bitcoin_members ON bt.member_id = bitcoin_members.member_id
    JOIN customer_regions ON bitcoin_members.region = customer_regions.region_name
    WHERE bt.txn_type = 'purchase'
    GROUP BY customer_regions.region_name, strftime('%Y', bt.txn_date)
),
filtered_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        region_name,
        year,
        avg_purchase_price,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY region_name ORDER BY year) AS year_rank
    FROM yearly_purchase_stats
),
excluded_first_year AS (
    SELECT 
        region_name,
        year,
        avg_purchase_price
    FROM filtered_stats
    WHERE year_rank > 1
),
ranked_by_year AS (
    SELECT 
        year,
        region_name,
        avg_purchase_price,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY year ORDER BY avg_purchase_price ASC) AS price_rank
    FROM excluded_first_year
),
with_prev_year AS (
    SELECT 
        region_name,
        year,
        avg_purchase_price,
        LAG(avg_purchase_price) OVER (PARTITION BY region_name ORDER BY year) AS prev_avg_purchase_price
    FROM excluded_first_year
),
final_result AS (
    SELECT 
        ry.year,
        ry.region_name,
        ry.avg_purchase_price,
        ry.price_rank,
        wpy.prev_avg_purchase_price,
        CASE 
            WHEN wpy.prev_avg_purchase_price IS NOT NULL THEN 
                ((ry.avg_purchase_price - wpy.prev_avg_purchase_price) / wpy.prev_avg_purchase_price) * 100
            ELSE NULL 
        END AS pct_change_from_prev_year
    FROM ranked_by_year ry
    JOIN with_prev_year wpy ON ry.region_name = wpy.region_name AND ry.year = wpy.year
)
SELECT 
    year,
    region_name,
    avg_purchase_price,
    price_rank,
    prev_avg_purchase_price,
    pct_change_from_prev_year
FROM final_result
ORDER BY year ASC, price_rank ASC;
